name: TC-TXN-008 — Filter Options: Retrieve available filter values
description:
Verifies the GET /transaction/filter-options endpoint.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction/filter-options
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with arrays of statuses (SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING), methods (MPESA, CARD, BANK), txn_types, and categories.
